candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary exists below the 'Operating costs ex depreciations' section, which suggests selected operating cost rows exclude D&A. However, this is a company-wide operating D&A total and is not specifically attributable to the selected COGS bucket 'Cost ofmaterials', so adding it to COGS would risk misallocation/double counting.
Separate D&A component row exists, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of materials related and appears to be part of broader operating D&A rather than specifically tied to the selected COGS row.
Separate depreciation component, but not labelled as COGS-specific; likely part of overall operating D&A and not safe to assign to the selected COGS row.
Separate amortization component, but not labelled as COGS-specific and therefore not safe to add to the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: The selected COGS bucket is only 'Cost ofmaterials'. The statement structure indicates operating costs are shown 'ex depreciations', so COGS likely excludes D&A, but no explicit row ties any D&A specifically to COGS/cost of materials. To avoid misallocation, do not add any D&A row separately to COGS.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-linked amortization row above EBIT. It is clearly separate from the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows and therefore should be added separately to XSGA-related D&A. This also fits the special R&D rule because the selected XRD row is not visible as a separate above-EBIT operating row in this excerpt.
Separate total operating D&A row exists, but it is broader than SG&A and would overlap COGS/other operating costs, so it should not be added to XSGA specifically.
Separate amortization row above EBIT, but not specifically linked to SG&A; could be broader operating amortization, so including it in XSGA would be uncertain and may double count.
Separate depreciation component exists, but not specifically linked to SG&A; likely broader operating depreciation.
Separate depreciation component exists, but not specifically linked to SG&A; likely broader operating depreciation.
Separate amortization component exists, but not specifically linked to SG&A; likely broader operating amortization.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS are 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' and 'Other operating expenses'. The explicit row 'Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' is clearly a separate SG&A-related D&A line and should be added. Broader D&A rows are not chosen because they are not bucket-specific and would risk double counting or misallocation.
